headline: Emcor Group (EME) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why
summary: Emcor Group (EME) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Is Quanta's Massive CapEx Plan a Risk or a Long-Term Gold Mine?
summary: PWR's higher capital spending targets grid upgrades and supply-chain expansion. Can record demand and backlog turn today's investment into lasting growth?

headline: Demand Strength for Data Center Infrastructure Boosted EMCOR Group (EME)
summary: TimesSquare Capital Management, an equity investment management company, released its “U.S. Mid Cap Growth Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy fell 7.72% (net) in the quarter compared to -6.35% for the Russell Midcap Growth Index. In the first quarter, markets navigated geopolitical tensions and economic resilience alongside […]

headline: EMCOR Group, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: NORWALK, Conn., July 01, 2026--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. The dividend will be paid on July 31, 2026 to stockholders of record as of July 15, 2026.
